pool.baseline: it's just so quiet. i keep walking into the kitchen thinking i heard him, but its just the silence. the house feels like a tomb now. i dont even know why i bother getting out of bed or making coffee when there's no one to share it with. everything just feels pointless.

pool.baseline: it's just hard to care about anything lately. like, i was looking at the stars tonight and just thinking about how massive everything is. in a billion years, or even a trillion, none of this—none of my problems, none of my life, none of this entire species—is even going to be a memory. it feels like we're just screaming into a void that doesn't even hear us. what's the point of even trying to keep going when the end result is just total nothingness anyway?

pool.baseline: i just feel like i've hit a wall and there's nowhere else to go. the last three years of my phd have basically evaporated because the data was garbage and the funding is gone. i look in the mirror and i dont even see a person anymore, just a failed project. i'm so exhausted. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: the candles are all burned down to nothing... just like everything else. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone walls. i feel like i'm just a ghost already, wandering through these rooms where love used to live. i don't see the point in waiting for a morning that only brings more emptiness. i just want to let the shadows take me. i want to fade away into the night and never have to wake up to this ache again.

pool.baseline: it's weird being out here. i was walking through the market today and realized that if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even twitch. like, i'm just a ghost in a different timezone. everything is so loud and busy but i feel like a zero-sum game. i don't actually add anything to the equation.
